message:
chore: Close process_triage-cr2 (FD collection)

Enhanced FD collection implemented:
- OpenFile struct with file paths and open modes (read/write)
- CriticalFile detection for safety gates
- Categories: sqlite WAL, git locks, package locks, database writes
- parse_fdinfo_content for extracting O_RDONLY/O_WRONLY/O_RDWR flags

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
